name: io.github.DareDev256/fcpxml-mcp-server
description: Batch operations, analysis, and LIVE control for Final Cut Pro. 56 tools incl. push-to-FCP and library inspection via Apple events; plus FCPXML editing, QC, generation, media relink, and .fcpxmld bundles.

environmentVariables.name: FCP_PROJECTS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory containing your FCPXML project files for auto-discovery
